description: Crafted for the cosmopolitan male, this bag from cabarelli is made with materials of superior quality. Wear this utilitarian, monochrome bag with formal or casual ensembles. Length: 41 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 11 cm Made of blended polyester Two main zippered compartments Laptop holder in the second compartment Two zippered compartments on the front Mesh pockets on both sides of the bag Padded and adjustable shoulder straps A padded haul loop Care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
